caption: A man with a tall, spiked grey wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting for a podcast. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. In front of him is a professional black microphone. Behind him, a wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items, including a garment labeled "LEE". On-screen text and logos appear in the lower corners, including "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". As the scene progresses, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. His facial expression shifts slightly as he talks, and his right hand moves from a raised position to a lower one. The background and equipment remain stationary throughout the sequence, focusing the action on the man's speech and movement.
